name: Zeepkist: Crash 2D
author: Poki
description: Zeepkist: Crash 2D is a funny car game where your mission is to create the most spectacular crashes with your Zeepkist to achieve high scores! Starting with your chosen pose, release your Zeepkist with maximum power and maneuver your character left and right at the right time before launching them. This Yeet action results in ultimate damage! The more chaos you cause, the more coins you'll earn. Spend your earnings on different cars, accessories, and obstacles to put on the road. you can also use the coins to unlock numerous maps in the game. Can you crash every Zeepkist you have? How to play Zeepkist: Crash 2D? Click the Zeepkist and Pose buttons to choose your car and pose. Use the Edit feature to add road obstacles. Hold and release the Power button to boost your Zeepkist. Choose the Left or Right button to move your character accordingly. Click Yeet to launch your character. You can also customize your character's hat or color! Who created Zeepkist: Crash 2D? Zeepkist: Crash 2D is created by Steelpan Interactive. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Zeepkist: Crash 2D for free? You can play Zeepkist: Crash 2D for free on Poki. Can I play Zeepkist: Crash 2D on mobile devices and desktop? Zeepkist: Crash 2D can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
